narrative:
Circleville-South (precinct in Pickaway County) has 981 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.9 percentage points.
